zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Foster於1510年出生在英國艾可伯奇時，她的父親Robert Foster 13th ggf28歲，母親Margaret Tendring25歲。她於1529年與John Southwell在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年2月5日在英國英格蘭艾可享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Foster于1510年出生在英国艾可伯奇时，她的父亲Robert Foster 13th ggf28岁，母亲Margaret Tendring25岁。她于1529年与John Southwell在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年2月5日在英国英格兰艾可享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Forster   ‘worker in a forest’.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English foster ‘foster parent’ (Old English fōstre, a derivative of fōstrian ‘to nourish or rear’). But other explanations are equally or more likely.
English: from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors’; see Forster 2.

variants.name: Fewster
meanings: English (mainly East Yorkshire and Durham): occupational name from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English fu(y)ster ‘maker of saddletrees’. See also Foster .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Foster was born in 1510, in Birch, Essex, England, her father, Robert Foster 13th ggf, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Tendring, was 25. She married John Southwell in 1529, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 February 1587, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Foster est née en 1510, à Birch, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Foster 13th ggf, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tendring, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Southwell en 1529, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1587, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Foster 1510 in Birch, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Foster 13th ggf 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Tendring 25. Sie hat 1529 in Essex, England, United Kingdom John Southwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1587 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Foster è nata il nel 1510 nel Birch, Essex, England, sua padre, Robert Foster 13th ggf, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Tendring, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Southwell nel 1529, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1587, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Foster(이)가 1510년 영국 에세스 비르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Foster 13th ggf(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Tendring(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 John Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 2월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Foster родилась в 1510 г. в местности бирч, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Foster 13th ggf было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Tendring, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Southwell в 1529 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 февраля 1587 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
